info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Invoice Management API
info.description: The Invoice Management API enables businesses to efficiently create and manage invoices within their financial software. This API allows users to submit new invoices, ensuring accurate billing and streamlined financial processes. Typical consumers include accountants, financial platforms, and business owners looking to automate invoicing tasks. Integrating this API enhances operational efficiency and improves financial tracking.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new billing invoice, providing all necessary details such as items, amounts, and customer information. Ensure that the request body contains valid data to successfully generate the invoice.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create a new billing invoice. It must contain all necessary information required to process the invoice correctly.

200.description: The request has been processed successfully.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.title: Error Response for Invoice Creation

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code indicating the type of error.

error.description: The error code associated with the error type.

errorCode.description: A specific error code to identify the problem.

message.description: A descriptive message providing more details about the error.
message.example: The order request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The API endpoint path where the error occurred.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracing the request across services.

validationErrors.description: A list of validation errors that occurred during request processing.

example.message: Selected speed is not available for the provided address.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to fix the error.
suggestion.example: Please verify customer details, service availability, and billing information before submitting the order.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.description: Schema representing the error response returned when an invoice creation operation fails.

example.message: The order request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Selected speed is not available for the provided address.

example.suggestion: Please verify customer details, service availability, and billing information before submitting the order.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Va.title: Validation Error

field.description: The name of the field that caused the validation error.

rejectedValue.description: The value that was rejected during validation.

message.description: A message explaining why the validation failed.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Va.description: Details of a validation error encountered during the processing of an invoice.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.title: Billing Invoice Request

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product being purchased.

orderType.description: Type of the order (e.g., new, upgrade, downgrade).

serviceDetails.description: Details about the service being provided.

address.description: The billing address for the invoice.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a billing invoice.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Se.title: Service Details

serviceType.description: The type of service (e.g., internet, phone, cable).

speed.description: The speed of the service (e.g., Mbps for internet services).

installationRequired.description: Indicates whether installation of the service is required.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Se.description: Schema representing the details of the service being provided.

street.description: Street address for the billing location.

postalCode.description: Postal code for the billing address.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Pa.title: Payment Information

method.description: Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer).

billingAccountId.description: Unique identifier for the billing account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Pa.description: Schema representing payment information for the invoice.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.title: Invoice Operation Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the response was generated.

status.description: The status code of the operation, indicating success or failure.

error.description: An error code that corresponds to the type of error encountered, if any.

errorCode.description: A specific error code for detailed error identification, if applicable.

message.description: A summary message providing additional context about the operation's outcome.
message.example: The order request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The path of the resource affected by the operation.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracing the request through the system.

validationErrors.description: A list of validation errors encountered during the operation, if any.

example.message: Selected speed is not available for the provided address.

suggestion.description: A suggestion or guidance for rectifying any issues encountered during the operation.
suggestion.example: Please verify customer details, service availability, and billing information before submitting the order.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createBillingInvoice-Cr.description: Response schema for a successful operation on invoices. It provides details of the operation including timestamps, status codes, and any validation errors that may have occurred.

example.message: The order request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Selected speed is not available for the provided address.

example.suggestion: Please verify customer details, service availability, and billing information before submitting the order.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates the response headers that may vary based on the request's parameters or context. Commonly used for caching mechanisms.

Location.description: Provides the URL of the newly created resource after a successful POST request.

content-type.description: Specifies the media type of the resource returned in the response. It informs the client about the nature of the data.
